title: ZDBB 1010 Pcs Rubber O Rings Kit 22 Size Universal O-Ring Assortment Set for Automotive Faucet Pressure Washers Plumbing Sealing Repair,Air or Gas Connections,Resist Oil and Heat
features: {WIDE APPLICATION} O-ring kit for faucets,plumbing,pressure washer,hose nozzles,sinks,filters,hydraulics fluid,auto engines, machinery bearings,pumps,boats,oils,gas control valve, spray, air,kitchen bathroom water fitting seal leak repair

{MULTIPLE SIZE} Metric oring assortment kits contains the most commonly used 22 size ID:(3mm, 4mm, 4.5mm, 5mm, 6mm, 7mm, 8mm, 9mm, 10mm, 12mm, 13mm, 14mm, 17mm, 18mm, 20mm, 22mm, 25mm, 27mm) x Thk:(1mm, 2mm, 2.4mm, 2.5mm, 3mm, 4mm),can meet almost all your needs

{MATERIAL} Rubber o rings set made of high-quality commercial grade black nitrile(NBR,Buna-N),it has excellent high temperature and low temperature resistance,the working temperature range is from -40℃/-40℉ to 120℃/248℉,maintains good elasticity,has It has the advantages of ozone resistance and weather resistance

{CONVENIENT STORAGE} Assorted o rings rubber are placed in a sturdy plastic storage box, each size with detailed label paper,are stored in order of small to large for easy retrieval.It can be used for months or even years rather than buying them at a hardware store
{Customer Service} ZDBB brand always guarantees high quality products and good after-sales service. If you have any dissatisfaction, please contact us
description: Product Description The nitrile rubber O-ring kit has good heat resistance: -30℃/-22℉ to 120℃/248℉. The kit satisfies all the requirements for your seal, used for common maintenance and replacement, is a good helper for maintenance workers. 6 common thicknesses to meet your different choices. Nitrile O-rings are the most widely used O-ring material in life. It has excellent oil resistance, good water tightness, high temperature resistance and wear resistance, and corrosion resistance. Metric O-Ring Kits in 22 Popular Sizes to Meet Nearly All Your Everyday Needs. Dimensions are as follows:ID x OD x CS(mm) 100Pcs:3x5x1mm/4x6x1mm 80Pcs:4.5x6.5x1mm/5x9x2mm/6x10x2mm/7x11x2mm 60Pcs:8x12x2mm/9x13x2mm 20Pcs:10x14x2mm/12x18x3mm/13x19x3mm/14x19x2.5mm 10Pcs:17x22x2.5mm 8Pcs:18x26x4mm/20x24x2mm/22x26x2mm/25x29.8x2.4mm/27x33x3mm 1000PCS 18 Size O Ring Kit+18 Size Rubber Washers Assortment Kit 610 PCS 20 Size O Ring Kit+10 Size Rubber Washers Assortment Kit 135 PCS Plumbing Hose Rubber Washers Assorted Set 1010 Pcs Rubber O Rings Kit, 22 Size Metric O Rings 386 PCS Metric FKM O Ring Kit 30 Sizes FKM Oring Set 32 Size 1540 PCS O Rings Assortment Kits Metric Nitrile NBR Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,886 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,886 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,886 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,886 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,886 4.5 out of 5 stars 9,886 Price £18.99 £ 18 . 99 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £39.99 £ 39 . 99 £17.99 £ 17 . 99 Category O-Ring + Flat Washer O-Ring + Flat Washer Flat Washers O- Ring O- Ring O- Ring Quantity 1000 PCS 610 PCS 135 PCS 1010 PCS 386 PCS 1540 PCS Material NBR+Silica gel NBR NBR+Silica gel NBR FKM NBR Distinction Metric O-Ring and Gasket Kits Metric O-Ring and Gasket Kits Plumbing Washer Metric Rubber Metric FKM Metric Rubber Pick and Hook Set ✓ N/A N/A N/A ✓ ✓
